kept.text: They Can Have My Recipe , But The Sauce Won’t Taste The Same 📝🏀 https://t.co/Ib41PMJkAr

WE ARE BACKING THE FUTURE GOAT 🐐

MLB POTD #2 | (5/5) ⚾️

Shohei Ohtani "O" 6.5 K's (-121) | @DraftKings 
#Dodgers

Collab w/ @DDOGGSTACKS, @KashyLocks & @PropKitchen ✍️

• Ohtani has been one of the best pitchers in baseball to start the season and this is another strong spot for him to clear this line. He was just named NL Pitcher of the Month after posting a 0.60 ERA with 34 strikeouts in April. He has gone 6 innings in every start and has recorded 7+ Ks in 3 straight games with 10, 7, and 9 Ks. When he has been allowed to throw 90+ pitches, he’s gone over this line in 3/4 starts averaging 7.0 Ks.

• His overall profile has been elite across the board. Ohtani holds a 2.23 xERA, .183 xBA, 28.6 K%, 31.4 Whiff%, and 31.1 Chase%. He also ranks in the 84th percentile in K%, 86th percentile in Whiff%, 95th percentile in xERA, and 92nd percentile in xBA. The stuff has been legit, and hitters have not been doing much damage when they do make contact.

• The Astros are normally not a team we love targeting for strikeouts, but they have been striking out more recently. Over their last 3 games, they rank 4th in Ks per game at 10.33, and we’ve already seen multiple RHP get there against them lately.

✅ Yoshinobu Yamamoto: 8 Ks / Line 6.5
✅ Chris Bassitt: 7 Ks / Line 4.5
✅ Shane Baz: 6 Ks / Line 4.5
✅ Will Warren: 6 Ks / Line 5.5
✅ Nolan Pallante: 5 Ks / Line 3.5
✅ Kyle Leahy: 6 Ks / Line 3.5

• There are also a few bats in this lineup that give Ohtani real strikeout paths. Cam Smith has a 27.7 K% and 32.8 Whiff% vs RHP, Brice Matthews has a 33.3 K% and 40.9 Whiff%, Carlos Correa has a 21.5 K% and 24.1 Whiff%, and Jose Altuve / Christian Walker both sit around 26% Whiff%. If Ohtani is getting ahead, there are enough swing and miss targets here.

• The biggest thing here is Ohtani’s leash and current form. He’s worked deep into every start, his pitch count has been there, and the strikeout stuff has looked better each time out. He also carries a better K%, Whiff%, and Chase% than Yamamoto, who just struck out 8 Astros yesterday.

• The Astros are disciplined, but Ohtani has the type of arsenal that can beat good lineups. With 7+ Ks in 3 straight, elite swing and miss metrics, and Houston showing more strikeout upside recently, this sets up well for another strong outing from Ohtani.

❤️ If your tailing ‼️

kept.text:
He Goes Off Tonight 🔥

1u- Jalen Duren Over 12.5 RA
(-115 #DraftKings) 

-Everyone on some variation of Duren today it seems but for good reason. New series and new schemes. I think Cleveland has to see how the Magic slowed him down and do the same. Make these other guys shoot from the oustide: although could get some pick And roll assists due to this and dribble handoffs as always. 

-He destroyed the boards vs them when he played normal minutes. 19 on 35 chances and 15 on 26 chances. Even Poeltl got to 12 RA in just 21 mins vs the Cavs team. We have seen Allen/mobley get out physicaled and out worked in the playoffs. Think Duren does that to them tonight. 

@propsmadness 📲💻

profile_bio.description: All things sports betting & fantasy Sports. Join the FREE Discord below 😈🐐

kept.text:
Trust The Vet Tonight 👀

1u- Marcus Smart Over 9.5 Points
(-121 #DraftKings)

-This is the exact guy I think the thunder will be ok with shooting tonight. LeBron and Reaves will have their hands full and Rui has shown you can’t leave him open: making smart shoot will be winning basketball for the thunder. 

-He had 9 shooting just 20% from the field their first game head to head and 19 the next game when Luka was out. I expect about that same volume again: he had 19 shots in just 29 mins. if it’s close tonight he will push for 35-40 mins easily.

@propsmadness 💻📲
